utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all of these items. Each section is fully specified: (1) destination lists Budapest, Hungary; (2) travel_dates specifies June 20–24, 2024; (3) transportation includes flight details with airline, class, dates, baggage, and cost; (4) accommodation includes property name, type, location, amenities, nightly and total cost, and breakfast; (5) activities list specific activities with duration, difficulty, inclusions, and cost; (6) additional_services include dining and insurance with details and costs; (7) total_budget provides total cost, currency, budget limit, and remaining budget. All required details are present and complete.
